panels.description: Number of cached addressContracts entries.
panels.title: AddrContracts cache entries

panels.description: Estimated bytes in the addressContracts cache.
panels.title: AddrContracts cache bytes

panels.description: addressContracts cache hits, misses and flushes (per minute).
panels.title: AddrContracts cache activity

panels.description: Seconds since the backend tip feed (EVM newHeads / Tron ZeroMQ) last delivered a notification. Healthy = low & flat; a sawtooth at/near the stall threshold means the feed is dead and the watchdog is carrying sync.
panels.title: Backend tip feed age

panels.description: watchdog_stall = feed went silent past the threshold; watchdog_tip_advanced = the fallback poll found blocks the feed missed (strongest signal the push feed is broken).
panels.title: Tip feed watchdog interventions /s

panels.description: Reconnect / resubscribe failures — non-zero sustained means the backend is unreachable (page).
panels.title: Tip feed reconnect / resubscribe failures /s

panels.description: All tip-feed lifecycle events by subscription and event. watchdog_tick is the heartbeat: rate==0 while up means the watchdog goroutine stopped ticking (a parked healer).
panels.title: Tip feed events /s (by subscription / event)

panels.description: 1 = Blockbook reports itself in sync with the backend, 0 = not in sync (mirrors /api/status inSync). Shown across all coins.
